subcodes.first_line: O kind friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The letter thou didst address to Jináb-i-Asadu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان عبدالبهاء نامه ایکه بجناب اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گشت از
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @justice and mercy
